# opnsense_dnsmasq_domain (Data Source)

Look up an existing Dnsmasq domain override on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_dnsmasq_domain" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "dnsmasq_domain_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_dnsmasq_domain.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for this domain override.
- `domain` (String) Domain name to override.
- `ip` (String) IP address or upstream server for this domain override.
- `ipset` (String) Firewall alias/IP set relation for this domain override.
- `port` (Number) Optional DNS server port.
- `sequence` (Number) Sequence number for ordering domain overrides.
- `source_ip` (String) Optional source IP constraint.
